texto: I just like to say I'm from London, I don't have any specific area I represent. I'm not representing for a small group of people. I'd like everybody to be able to relate to a nerd, because everybody's a bit nerdy. I'm more interested in that than in where they're from. I'm more interested in what people do.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Craig Taylor: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I just like to say I'm from London, I don't have any specific area I represent. I'm not represent…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, london, nerd pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de nerd e nonfiction.

frase_original: I just like to say I'm from London, I don't have any specific area I represent. I'm not representing for a small group of people. I'd like everybody to be able to relate to a nerd, because everybody's a bit nerdy. I'm more interested in that than in where they're from. I'm more interested in what people do.
